# 1 in 7 - Endometriosis & Adenomyosis Resources

> Comprehensive, evidence-based resource hub for Endometriosis and Adenomyosis. Named for the statistic that 1 in 7 women and people assigned female at birth are affected. No trackers, no third-party requests; all data stays on-device.

## Key facts

- Endometriosis affects approximately 190 million people worldwide (roughly 1 in 7 women and AFAB individuals)
- Average diagnosis time: 7-10 years from symptom onset
- Gold standard treatment: laparoscopic excision surgery
- There is currently no cure for either Endometriosis or Adenomyosis
- Hysterectomy treats Adenomyosis but does NOT treat Endometriosis (lesions exist outside the uterus)
- Endometriosis can affect any organ system, not just reproductive organs

## Getting started

- [Endometriosis](https://1in7.info/endometriosis/): Comprehensive guide covering symptoms, stages, diagnosis methods, treatment options, and support resources
- [Adenomyosis](https://1in7.info/adenomyosis/): Guide covering symptoms, diagnosis, treatment options, and specialist resources for this condition affecting the uterine muscular wall
- [Symptom Quiz](https://1in7.info/quiz/): Guided checklist to help understand whether your symptoms match Endometriosis or Adenomyosis, with personalized next steps

## Could this be me?

- [Diagnosis](https://1in7.info/diagnosis/): Diagnostic methods, symptom staging, surgical and non-surgical treatments, medicinal options, and scientific research findings
- [Co-morbidities](https://1in7.info/comorbidities/): Research-backed comorbidity data including gynecological, gastrointestinal, neurological, mental health, autoimmune, and novel associations
- [Healthcare Providers](https://1in7.info/healthcare/): Vetted specialists, diagnostic tools, medical data trackers, and AI-enabled research platforms
- [Myths & Facts](https://1in7.info/myths/): Debunking common myths with evidence-based facts and medical sources

## I have endo or adeno

- [Treatments](https://1in7.info/treatments/): Overview of treatment options: surgical, hormonal, non-hormonal, and supportive
- [Surgery Costs](https://1in7.info/surgery-costs/): Real surgery cost data from patients worldwide: quoted fees, insurance billed, and out-of-pocket amounts
- [Medications](https://1in7.info/medications/): Comprehensive comparison of medications used to treat Endometriosis and Adenomyosis
- [Fertility](https://1in7.info/fertility/): Impact on fertility, IVF, egg freezing, and conception guidance
- [Mental Health](https://1in7.info/mental-health/): Coping strategies, therapy options (CBT, ACT, EMDR, MBSR), crisis support
- [Support & Advocacy](https://1in7.info/resources/): Financial assistance, advocacy groups, vetted regional providers, and fertility resources worldwide
- [Symptom Tracker](https://1in7.info/tracker/): Track symptoms privately on your device - data never leaves the browser

## Learn

- [Notable People](https://1in7.info/notable-people/): 60+ public figures who have spoken openly about their Endometriosis diagnosis, surgeries, and advocacy
- [In Memory](https://1in7.info/in-memory/): Honoring those lost to Endometriosis
- [Research](https://1in7.info/research/): Scientific research organizations, current studies, clinical trials, and genetic research
- [Education](https://1in7.info/education/): Films, books, and community resources for awareness and understanding
- [Take Action](https://1in7.info/take-action/): Practical scripts for talking to doctors, family, and partners about Endometriosis or Adenomyosis

## More

- [FAQ](https://1in7.info/faq/): Common questions and answers about Endometriosis and Adenomyosis
- [About](https://1in7.info/about/): About the project, a community-driven open-source initiative
- [Privacy](https://1in7.info/privacy/): How the site handles your data: by default, nothing leaves your device

## Technical details

- URL: https://1in7.info
- Languages: 26 (English default, Arabic with RTL support)
- Privacy: No third-party requests, no tracking, self-hosted fonts (Figtree, OFL 1.1)
- Accessibility: WCAG AA compliant, keyboard navigable, screen reader optimized
- Open source: Community-driven, contributions welcome
- Contact: bloomedhealth@pm.me
